summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PHASE 2.9 Calibration Layer with 5 submodules. All core functionality working correctly with mock data.

minor_bugs.issue: Aggregated metrics missing 'expectancy' field, has other metrics instead
minor_bugs.impact: Very minor - all other core metrics present (win_rate, profit_factor, etc.)

passed_tests: Full calibration pipeline with mock data processing 5000 trades
Failure analysis with breakdown by wrong_direction, wrong_early, late_entry, etc.
Degradation detection across symbols with trend analysis
Overall summary with system health assessment
Matrix aggregation by symbol, cluster, timeframe, regime, strategy
All 5 submodules (CalibrationMatrix, FailureMap, DegradationEngine, EdgeClassifier, CalibrationActions) operational
